fields.label: Salary Allocation Account
fields.description: Account used for AEC labor cost allocation on Timesheet submission (e.g. 5110 - Salaries Allocation)

fields.label: Default Activity Type
fields.description: Default activity type applied to Timesheet rows when none is set

fields.label: Default VAT Rate (%)
fields.description: Applied to Sales Invoices when no tax template is set

fields.label: Default Payment Terms
fields.description: Applied to new Project Charters and Sales Orders

fields.label: Burn Rate Alert Threshold (%)
fields.description: Projects exceeding this burn % trigger an email alert to PM and Managing Partner

fields.label: Default Retention (%)
fields.description: Default retention % applied to new Subcontractor Valuations

fields.label: Snag Resolution SLA (Days)
fields.description: Days after which an unresolved Critical snag blocks payment

fields.label: Gate Review Document Required
fields.description: If checked, a Gate Review record must exist before gate progression is approved
